meta.source: CelesTrak GP (General Perturbations orbital element sets)
meta.name: ISS (ZARYA)
meta.underlying_data: US Space Force / 18th Space Defense Squadron (18 SDS), obtained via Space-Track and redistributed by CelesTrak
meta.license: Underlying orbital data is US Government work, public domain (17 U.S.C. 105). CelesTrak imposes no license fee or attribution requirement; the binding condition is its Usage Policy (rate limits + caching).
meta.attribution: Orbital data: US Space Force (18 SDS) via CelesTrak (celestrak.org)
meta.usage_policy_note: CelesTrak checks for new GP data once every ~2 hours; fetch at most once per update. This file is a cron mirror so all app users read one cached copy instead of querying CelesTrak.
meta.note: Committed TLE mirror refreshed twice daily by a GitHub Action. SGP4 (client-side) propagates tle.line1/line2 verbatim to a live position + ground track. Accuracy is ~1 km near epoch and degrades ~1-3 km/day; a week-old TLE can be tens of km off, so the tab must display the TLE epoch/age.
